# 在 Remotion 中显示字幕

entries.en-US: This guide explains how to display captions in Remotion, assuming you already have captions in the `Caption` format.
entries.zh-Hans: 本指南介绍如何在 Remotion 中显示字幕，假设您已拥有 `Caption` 格式的字幕。

entries.en-US:
First, the @remotion/captions package needs to be installed.
If it is not installed, use the following command:
entries.zh-Hans:
首先，需要安装 @remotion/captions 包。
如果尚未安装，请使用以下命令：

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/captions # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: Use `createTikTokStyleCaptions()` to group captions into pages. The `combineTokensWithinMilliseconds` option controls how many words appear at once:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `createTikTokStyleCaptions()` 将字幕分组为页面。`combineTokensWithinMilliseconds` 选项控制一次显示多少个单词：

entries.en-US: Map over the pages and render each one in a `<Sequence>`. Calculate the start frame and duration from the page timing:
entries.zh-Hans: 遍历页面并在 `<Sequence>` 中渲染每个页面。根据页面时间计算起始帧和持续时间：

entries.en-US: A caption page contains `tokens` which you can use to highlight the currently spoken word:
entries.zh-Hans: 字幕页面包含 `tokens`，您可以用它来高亮当前正在朗读的单词：
